name: LOKI
description: What greater thrill is there for a God of Mischief than to outsmart his foes? The cunning trickster Loki uses his illusions and shapeshifting abilities to weave in and out of combat, toying with enemies at every turn.
lore: Born the son of Laufey, king of the Frost Giants, Loki was adopted by Odin and raised as a prince of Asgard. But his true nature could not be undone, and Loki would come to fully embrace his role as the God of Mischief. With his father deep in the Odinsleep, Loki seized his chance to take the throne for himself. After enlisting Hela in his plot and hurling his brother Thor into a distant timeline, Loki now harvests Chronovium sap from the World Tree, Yggdrasil, in an effort to conquer the entire timestream.

abilities.name: Mystical Missile
abilities.description: Fire Mystical Missiles to heal allies or deal damage to enemies. Direct hits on allies provide extra healing

stats.Casting: Single-cast projectile with delayed impact that also generates a spell field
stats.Damage: The projectile deals no damage, while the spell field inflicts 25 damage per cast
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 0.5m, decreasing to 80% at 2.5m

abilities.name: God of Mischief
abilities.description: Shapeshift into a targeted ally or enemy hero and use all their abilities except any of their Team-Up Abilities

stats.Special Effect: After transforming, Loki's Ultimate ability will be fully charged. Casting a transformation-type Ultimate ability will extend the duration of God of Mischief until the transformation ability ends

abilities.name: Regeneration Domain
abilities.description: Use Rune Stones to create a magical field that provides allies Healing and converts incoming damage into further healing

stats.Casting: Release a spell field at the location of Loki and the Illusion
stats.Special Effect: The spell field is sustained by Rune Stones. It will disappear if the Rune Stone is destroyed or if its maximum duration is reached. Allies within the field will receive healing over time, and any damage taken will be converted into healing based on the amount of damage taken
stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 5m and a height of 2m

abilities.name: Doppelganger
abilities.description: Project an Illusion that can cast some of Loki's abilities

stats.Special Effect: Project an Illusion at a selected location
stats.Cooldown: 2 charges, with each charge taking 12s to recharge

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.description: Pull out a dagger to stab enemies, dealing extra damage when attacking an enemy from behind

abilities.name: Deception
abilities.description: Become Invisible and conjure an Illusion to deceive enemies

stats.Special Effect: Loki leaves an illusion in his place and becomes invisible while continuously healing himself. This invisibility has no time limit, but any actions other than casting Devious Exchange, reloading, or casting Doppelganger will render him visible
stats.Healing Amount: Health regenerates at a rate of 20 Health per second while invisible

received.name: Deific Blessing
received.description: Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost

stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 6.5m and a height of 2m.

base.description: Gain a new ability to target fallen heroes (friend or foe), letting Loki assume their form for a set time (cannot cast their Ultimate Ability).

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hela, Loki's transformation lasts slightly longer. Furthermore, taking lethal damage while transformed or in his Ultimate Ability state will merely revert him back to Loki with a sliver of Health, preventing a KO.
